text: Getting back to the gym after 2 months off isn't easy. It's a daily reminder that discipline is what separates me from my excuses. Every rep is a step closer to my dreams, no matter how small.
decision_reason: directly addresses the struggle of getting back to the gym and ties it to discipline and progress

text: I still remember my first day back at the gym after 2 months off. I couldn't even do a single pull-up. But I showed up, and that's what mattered. Now, every rep is a reminder that progress is possible.
decision_reason: shares a personal story of struggle and progress to motivate and relate to the audience

text: Progress isn't about being perfect, it's about being persistent. Every rep, every sweat drop, is a step closer to my dreams. I'm not where I want to be, but I'm farther than I was.
decision_reason: offers a reframe on progress and perfection, emphasizing persistence over perfection
